title: Add Table on form and Filling forms Interaction
excerpt:
Hi Everyone! 
Please is there any chance to add table on forms and add rows by the filler person? 
I would like to create a form for our department fill it up as many as their needs to request. as followed example. 
Chee…

posts.author: tterra (Altemar Terra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone!

Please is there any chance to add table on forms and add rows by the filler person?

I would like to create a form for our department fill it up as many as their needs to request. as followed example.

Cheers!!

image1250×545 153 KB

posts.author: Lea1 (Lea)
posts.cookedHtml: i am looking to do something like that also !

posts.author: Shannon.Cribb (Shannon Cribb)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to do something similar! We are trying to move our Purchase order system over and would require a table to be within the form.

posts.author: LaurenStrobel (Lauren Strobel)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also looking to do something similar! We are trying to transition our sales team into Monday. A table view for forms that would allow for multiple submissions at once would be a game changer!

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

You can add a table view using SuperForm. It’s a quick toggle (list vs. table view) in the righthand form editor.

Check it out here - SuperForm - monday.com Marketplace

Hope this can help you make better forms!
